# Status

Current phase + a dated changelog of meaningful progress. Append a dated line whenever
something meaningful lands (newest at the top of the log).

## Current phase

**Scaffolding** — repo created, foundational decisions locked (D1–D3), open questions
Q1–Q5 captured, architecture overview drafted. IPC mechanism and wire protocol (Q1–Q2)
are the highest-priority open questions; resolving them unblocks the first code spike.
Not yet usable.
